alkylation reagent: alkylated with 10 mM iodoacetamide in the dark.
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 10 mM iodoacetamide in the dark.
cleavage agent: Enzyme specificity was set to trypsin, and up to two missed cleavages were allowed.
fragmentation method: Data were acquired in data-dependent acquisition mode, using the Top10 method.
instrument: samples BOS1: Q Exactive Plus, samples BOS2-3: Fusion Lumos, BOS4: Q Exactive HFX.
ionization type: coupled online through a nanoelectrospray ionization emitter.
